title: Collection Persistence, Versioned Schemas, Atomic Replacement, and Restore · Language Lens: Pokedex Go Save Schema
summary: The program writes live maps directly to the final file, trusts arbitrary JSON on load, has no schema version, loses permissions on replacement, and cannot recover from interruption. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go save schema increment in versioned atomic offline collection store. Learners progress through prediction, expli…
objectives: Define version, application identity, timestamp policy, records, provenance, and checksum or integrity scope with deterministic encoding.
Keep browser lessons on pure byte models and place native filesystem effects behind an injected save and load port.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.instruction:
